nasb.text: Now the poor man died and was carried away by the angels to Abraham’s bosom; and the rich man also died and was buried.

esv.text: The poor man died and was carried by the angels to Abraham’s side.  The rich man also died and was buried,

cnv.text: 後來乞丐死了，被天使送到亞伯拉罕的懷裡。那財主也死了，並且埋葬了。

ccb.text: “后来，乞丐死了，天使带他到亚伯拉罕身边。财主也死了，被人埋葬了。

csbs.text: 后来那穷人死了，被天使们带到亚伯拉罕的怀里。接着，那财主也死了，并且被埋葬了。
